operating_model: five autonomous teams sharing one durable state

vercel_studio.priority: restore audible iPhone sound, then improve graphics and interaction

cloudflare_research.priority: restore resolvable deployment and build research-to-value routes

independent_creative_web.surface: independent creative site unrelated to Mirror Cartographer
independent_creative_web.priority: establish a distinct identity, visual law, and deployable home

continuity_mining.priority: recover project history and update the knowledge substrate

frontier_research.priority: convert external advances into tested artifacts

hard_boundaries: Never add payment or conversion logic to Vercel.
Never delete GitHub files or history.
The independent creative site must not become another Mirror Cartographer explanation page.
Do not report implementation without evidence.
Do not publish private chat or health material into public repositories.
coordination_rule: Every team reads this state and ACTIVE_QUEUE.json before work, updates only its owned records, and leaves evidence plus a trigger request for peers.
